ScopeaCalendar is an Android app developed byTapir Apps GmbHin Munich, Germany. We take privacy very seriously and collect no data from our users.aCalendar is a user interfaces to the Android calendar storage for events and Android contacts for birthdays.The plus version includes all features that can be bought as in-app-purchase in the regular (free) version.This privacy policy governs both app versions.For any questions regarding our privacy policy please contact our support by email to

Calendar and Contacts dataaCalendar operates on Android's local calendar and contacts data.aCalendar never transfers your calendar or contacts data to Tapir Apps or third parties.Please be aware, that calendar and contacts data can be read by any app on your device with the appropriate permissions, as these are standard Android interfaces.If you use cloud calendars to sync your calendar data, please read the privacy policies of your cloud services.Â§

Tasks dataIf installed, aCalendar can access tasks from the Open Tasks app.aCalendar offers Google Tasks support with its own local storage and synchronization to Google's server. Please see Google'sprivacy policyfor details.aCalendar never transfers your tasks data to Tapir Apps or any other third parties.Â§

Data we collectNone. We collect no data from our users. The only data we receive from you, is through support requests sent to us by email or other support channels. All such data will be treated strictly confidential.Â§

Third party libraries usedThe free aCalendar version uses ads fromGoogle, please see Google'sprivacy policy on advertisementfor details.To configure your Google ad experience, please visitGoogle ad preferencesor in aCalendar settings - ads.The free aCalendar version uses ads fromFacebook, please see Facebook'sprivacy policyfor details.To configure your Facebook ad experience, please visitFacebook ad preferences.The free aCalendar version from Huawei AppGallery uses ads fromHuawei ads, please see the
Statement About HUAWEI Ads and Privacyfor details.
